LanguageData.WULA_Hostile_Progressive_Outpost.label: Wula Empire Progressive outpost
LanguageData.WULA_Hostile_Progressive_Outpost.customT: This Wula Empire Fabricator, originally used for producing materials, is trying to cut into a sturdy safe with its high-energy cutting blade—but the safe won't budge.
Your colonist disabled the Fabricator, and a scalding-hot safe fell out.
LanguageData.Wula_PsiTitan_Boss_Map.label: Area where the Psititan was discovered
LanguageData.WULA_Super_Fortress_Map.label: Giant Wula Empire fortress
